content.en:
Since this is just a boundary rift, the Demon Seed Abyss will not send a large number of Demon Seeds in after continuous losses, otherwise it will not be cost-effective.

After all, the number of demon seeds is not endless, and once it is lost, it is not easy to replenish.

Especially the mid-level demon seed, for many demon seed forces, it is also an intermediate power, and it cannot be easily lost.

Therefore, gradually, the Demon Seed Abyss also gave up on this Boundary Crack, and occasionally some Demon Seeds entered this Boundary Crack to look for resources, and it was estimated that it was also a demon seed with no power background, and they didn't know the situation of this Boundary Crack at all, so they dared to break in.

For the Terrans, it is equivalent to taking this boundary crack into their pockets.

......

After occupying this rift, the Terrans also built a fortress at the entrance of this rift, sending the gods of the realm to guard this place, and also to prevent the gods of other forces from entering here and blocking the news here.

Some seams are open, but some seams can not be opened.

Like the boundary crack in the territory of the Momen at the beginning, in addition to the Momen, many medium-sized forces also entered it, and this was because it was difficult for a single force to resist the demons in the crack, so many forces were allowed to enter together.

But now, the human race has enough strength to occupy this boundary gap, and naturally it will not give other forces a chance to enter.

It's like the top forces such as the Dongwu Ancient Sect, which completely occupied the boundary of the Dongwu Realm, and didn't give the powerful forces a chance to enter before, or they couldn't withstand the attacks of the demon seeds later, so they allowed the powerful forces to participate, but they also expelled the powerful forces afterwards and didn't give them a chance at all.

This is the advantage of being strong, you can do whatever you want, and the weak are completely unqualified to resist.

Since occupying this boundary rift, Ye Tian also began to ask other human realm gods to find more boundary rifts, and he believed that there would definitely be more and more boundary rifts in the Eternal Realm in the future, and only by occupying some boundary rifts first could he get more resources.

It would be even better if you found a new Boundary Rift.

However, the current strength of the human race is not yet qualified to occupy a boundary rift realm, and once those top forces know about it, they will definitely snatch it or participate in it.

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian convened many realm gods of the human race to start a meeting, but all those who were qualified to participate in this meeting were primary-level realm gods, middle-level realm gods and even high-level realm gods, and ordinary realm gods were not even qualified to participate.

"I've seen the Ancestor!"

The gods of the human race realm were extremely respectful.

Among these realm gods, many of them are the descendants of Ye Tian's heirs, even if they are not from the Ye family, they are also flowing with the blood of the Ye family, which is also normal, after all, the bloodline of the Ye family is spread throughout the human race, and I don't know how many Ye family women have married, and the bloodline has naturally spread.

Moreover, Ye Tian was extremely powerful, which caused these bloodlines to be extremely powerful, and it was easier to give birth to realm gods.

Therefore, most of the realm gods here are more or less related to Ye Tian, and almost all of the resources for their cultivation are given by the human race, and the resources of the human race are also obtained by Ye Tian's hard work.

Because of this, these realm gods worship and respect Ye Tian incomparably.

Seeing that these realm gods were almost here, the meeting began.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the definite news now is that the Eternal Realm will be restored, and the Death Zone will be transformed into a normal realm, and at that time, the Eternal Realm will be no less than the Realm God Realm, and even gradually surpass the Realm God Realm to a certain extent. Ye Tian said.

These realm gods naturally knew about this, so they were not surprised in the slightest.

Ye Tian continued: "Over the years, the foundation of our human race has been shifting to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, which was not wrong before, but now it is not suitable to continue to transfer power to the realm of the realm of the Realm of Gods. Moreover, in the realm of the Realm God Realm, our territory is too small, and it is already the limit to be able to obtain more than a dozen eternal kingdoms, and then we continue to transfer the eternal kingdoms, there is no suitable territory to settle. Therefore, I think it is possible to transfer the Realm Gods of the Realm Realm back and focus on cultivating the Eternal Realm of the Eternal Realm in the future!"

"Ancestor, I think we can indeed focus on the development of the Eternal Realm of the Terran Eternal Realm, we already have tens of thousands of Eternal Realms and other more extensive territories in the Eternal Realm, this has already laid a solid foundation, once the Eternal Realm is completely restored, our Terran will really take off. A Terran god said.

Immediately, the other Race Realm Gods made their own remarks, and only a few Realm Gods objected.

The reason why these opposing realm gods are opposed is that they have already gained a foothold in the realm of the realm of the realm of the gods, and have transferred all their relatives to the realm of the realm of the gods, and their development is also very good, and they do not want to return to the eternal realm for the time being.

In the continuous discussion, Ye Tian formulated the development strategy of the human race in the future, and the first focus was naturally to vigorously cultivate the eternal kingdom of the human race in the eternal realm, and transfer a large number of realm gods back.

"'Okay, that's it, let's do it like this, if you encounter a small problem, solve it yourself, if it can't be solved, come to me again!" Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Many world gods responded.

...... []

The years passed, and another 10 million solstice years passed.

At this time, one percent of the death zone had been converted into normal territory.

One percent of the Eternal Realm has returned to normal, and countless forces can already be placed.

Therefore, some top forces are also preparing to relocate some living beings on a large scale and enter the Eternal Realm.

The Terran Sanctuary flies.

Ye Tian frowned slightly at this moment.

Recently, many powerful forces have dared to come to trouble the Terrans. (Wang Zhao)

These powerful forces have no foundation at all in the Eternal Realm, so there are many territories that are ownerless and can be occupied by them, but they have entered the market late, and the good places are occupied by the top forces.

In addition, the Terrans occupy a lot of territory, many times wider than the territory occupied by many top forces.

Therefore, these powerful forces are jealous, and they want to directly occupy the territory of the human race, so that they can directly let the creatures under their command enter these eternal realms, without the need for development and development.

However, after his son Ye Xingchen showed the strength of a high-level realm god, these powerful forces apologized one by one in fright.

But Ye Tian knew very well that these powerful forces were afraid of the Terrans, but some of the top forces were absolutely not afraid of the Terrans, and even dared to directly attack the Terrans.

When the time comes, the Terrans will definitely clash with one or even several top powers.
